_description: CLAIRE change log. Every applied config change gets an entry. Human-maintained. Never auto-written by the pipeline.
_hypothesis_instructions: Before applying any candidate: write one sentence. What behavior do you expect to change, in what context, observable how? If you cannot write this sentence, do not apply the change.
_eval_instructions: Quarterly: feed this file to Claude with your session notes. Ask for eval report. Changes with consistent positive eval_notes stay. Neutral changes get reviewed. Changes with friction get reverted and source signal gets flagged low-quality.

changes.summary: Added OUTPUT VERIFICATION section -- hallucination self-audit with [verify] inline marker and external audience consolidation rule
changes.hypothesis: Claude will flag uncertain citations with [verify] rather than asserting fabricated confidence, reducing liability exposure in governance document review pipelines. External audience outputs will consolidate [verify] items into a review checklist rather than leaving markers inline.

changes.summary: Added DRIFT MODE to MODES section -- automatic context saturation detection with structured handoff note
changes.hypothesis: Claude will proactively surface context drift in long governance and vendor due diligence sessions before silent quality collapse occurs, with a structured handoff note covering session state and open threads. False positive cost: occasional interruptions in sessions where drift has not actually occurred -- eval notes should track frequency.
